item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 9min #LIVID — Bryson DeChambeau is NOT happy with the course conditions at LIV Mexico City @BrysonLegion
“You got destroyed grass… oh this is rough.”
“Guys this is what we’re playing on apparently!”
(Via: perisgoIf/IG) 12 14 68 7 mil

item.title: TheShotgunStart: Fried Egg Golf reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 28min "They had the money, but also they were willing to pa
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 28min "They had the money, but also they were willing to pay players this upfront because they were trying to overwhelm the market... Once that strategy starts not to work out, LIV Golf is very susceptible to any shift in the PIF strategy."
@garrett_TFE on LIV's funding questions: 1 4 2 mil

item.title: Robopz: Monday Q Info reposteó Robopz @Robopz · 46min And then there is this... from Sky Sports... Yesterday, Premiere Golf Leag
item.description: Monday Q Info reposteó Robopz @Robopz · 46min And then there is this... from Sky Sports... Yesterday, Premiere Golf League sues LIV Golf & PIF... (Premiere Golf League are the originators of the team Golf concept that was hijacked from them by LIV/PIF) 3 3 10 4 mil

item.title:
5ClubsGolf: Fried Egg Golf reposteó 5 Clubs @5ClubsGolf · 37min The conversation around Rory McIlroy is changing…
Not “what happene
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf reposteó 5 Clubs @5ClubsGolf · 37min The conversation around Rory McIlroy is changing…
Not “what happened?” But “what’s next?”
At nearly 37, his game travels everywhere. His mindset has evolved. And now?
Every major feels like it’s back on the table.
How many more does he have in him?
Watch our Rory Recap show Mostrar más 2 4 2 mil
